profile.name: Karey Stratford Jr.
profile.title: Technical Leader in Program & Project Management | AI & Data Analytics
profile.summary: Results-driven IT Program Manager recognized for successfully delivering complex projects and fostering cross-enterprise collaboration to achieve strategic outcomes. 25 years in software Development/QA/IT project management with expertise in Agile & Hybrid Product Delivery.
profile.contactText: Always eager to learn and embrace new challenges. Currently based in North Florida, but open to relocation for the right opportunity.

experience.title: Consulting Business Analyst
description: Assisted with migration and enhancement of Power BI dashboards, integrating data from legacy SQL environments into a new Snowflake‑based servicing platform.
Conducted comprehensive audits and user acceptance testing for insurance outputs and Data Warehouse updates.
Analyzed and audited existing telecom contracts, identifying cost‑saving opportunities delivering 2K in annual savings.
Evaluated Data Warehouse modernization options and authored a strategic white paper for the COO.

experience.title: Product Operations Manager
description: Optimized Agile intake and release planning resulting in 52% decrease in time to initial review and a 46% accelerating product delivery.
Analyzed and prioritized backlog to improve cycle times resulting in a 21% year‐over‐year reduction in time to release.
Partnered with Product, Engineering, and Customer Success to drive execution across core mortgage servicing products.

experience.title: Director of Program Management
description: Directed program delivery for the Default Management Platform (Tempo), coordinating four cross-functional teams.
Produced executive roadmaps, Gantt charts and resourcing reports supporting engineering capacity planning.
Led project planning via MS Project and Smartsheet and managed sprint execution and release planning through Azure DevOps.

experience.title: Program Manager
description: Orchestrated enterprise-wide IT integration post-merger of defi and Sagent.
Coordinated weekly rollup reporting on 20-workstream Enterprise integration project.
Personally presented 20 workstream 4-blocker project updates to C-level executive team on a weekly basis.
Authored Statement of Work for new implementation partnering with Rivian Financial Services.

experience.title: IT Program Manager
description: Managed delivery of software development projects for two mission-critical enrollment systems.
Unified seven independent teams using Agile, Scrum, and hybrid methodologies.
Leveraged MS Project for budgeting and timeline tracking for all projects and financial reporting.

experience.title: Integration Program Manager
description: Championed delivery of Black Knight's first consumer-facing web/mobile app.
Streamlined vendor integrations via Postman, Splunk, and SoapUI; managed work prioritization and daily Scrum ceremonies.

education.degree: Master's Degree, Business Administration and Management (MBA)
Bachelor of Science, Electrical and Computer Engineering (BSEE)

projects.title: Black Knight Consumer Web/Mobile Launch
projects.description: Directed the delivery of the organization's first consumer-facing mobile and responsive web applications.
projects.impact: Successfully launched high-visibility digital products using hybrid Agile/Waterfall methodologies.

projects.title: defi & Sagent Enterprise Integration
projects.description: Orchestrated enterprise-wide IT integration post-merger of defi and Sagent Auto from Fiserv.
projects.impact: Managed 20+ workstreams and delivered weekly C-level reporting on critical integration milestones.

projects.title: Default Management Platform (Tempo)
projects.description: Directed program delivery for the core Default Management platform, managing four cross-functional teams.
projects.impact: Improved resource utilization and engineering capacity planning through executive roadmap alignment.

metrics.label: Acceleration
metrics.description: Reduction in product delivery time through optimized Agile intake and release planning.

metrics.label: Review Efficiency
metrics.description: Decrease in time to initial review by streamlining cross-functional coordination.

metrics.label: Cycle Time
metrics.description: Year-over-year reduction in time to release via prioritized backlog management.

metrics.label: Experience
metrics.description: Years leading software development, QA, and IT program management initiatives.
